title: Magsaysay Heat Wave
lead: Magsaysay is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.97. The city's temperature has exceeded normal levels, posing a threat to its residents.
body:
The current heat wave in Magsaysay has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The city's weather conditions are characterized by high temperatures, with a CDD of 12.9 GG and low humidity of 62%. 
 The wind speed is moderate at 8.7 km/h, but it is not enough to provide relief from the heat.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the heat wave's effects immediately.
